footer.description: One group. Multiple trusted divisions operating with heritage discipline and future-facing capability.

trustBar.brands: AR Perfumes · Femison · Neat & Fresh · Future Beyond Technology

welcome.belief: We built this company with one belief — that every home in India deserves products made with honesty, care, and pride.
welcome.morningLine: A fresh day begins with trust.
welcome.afternoonLine: Thank you for choosing to be here.
welcome.eveningLine: We are glad you found us.

home.title: Home
home.description: Firose Enterprises is a diversified enterprise group across fragrance, baby care and nutrition, hygiene FMCG, and AI-driven technology systems.
home.heroSubtitle: Firose Enterprises combines heritage consumer brands and future-focused technology capability into one disciplined operating group.
home.portfolioDescription: Every division is positioned with category clarity, distinct demand channels, and a quality framework that protects brand equity over time.
home.fbtDescription: FBT leads enterprise automation, AI engineering, and cybersecurity systems for organizations that require secure, scalable, and production-ready infrastructure.
home.aiEngineeringDesc: Secure architecture and enterprise systems for modern organizations.
home.firoseStandardDesc: A single operating philosophy guides every category: measured growth, disciplined quality, and consistent service delivery.
home.qualityCard1: Controlled checkpoints across sourcing, manufacturing, and release.
home.qualityCard2: Reliable support for distributors, institutions, and modern trade.
home.qualityCard3: Category-led brand architecture with dedicated conversion paths.
home.qualityCard4: Direct communication channels for faster business decisions.
home.conversationDesc: For distribution, category expansion, or enterprise technology initiatives, connect directly with our corporate team.
home.swachhBharatBody: FIROSE Enterprises shares the vision of Swachh Bharat Abhiyan — India's national mission for cleanliness and hygiene. Through our Neat & Fresh division, we work to make quality hygiene products accessible and affordable to every Indian home, office, and institution.

brandNav.title: Brand Navigation
brandNav.description: Access dedicated websites for each operating brand.
brandNav.navNote: Navigation opens in the same tab for a continuous, professional browsing experience.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn about Firose Enterprises, its mission, values, leadership direction, and multi-division growth strategy including Future Beyond Technology (FBT).
about.aboutDesc: Firose Enterprises is a diversified parent group where consumer brands and technology operations run through a single philosophy: trust, discipline, and sustained market relevance.
about.cleanerDesc: We designed FIROSE to be understood quickly, remembered clearly, and experienced with confidence across every stakeholder interaction.
about.corporatePrecisionDesc: Every division follows a clear operating standard with controlled quality and measurable delivery discipline.
about.visualClarityDesc: Each business has a distinct identity while staying anchored to one unified FIROSE enterprise system.
about.futureReadyDesc: From consumer products to AI engineering, we build long-horizon capacity for market relevance and scale.
about.leadershipQuote: We are shaping FIROSE as a long-term enterprise where every division earns trust through product quality, clear positioning, and consistent delivery.
about.leadershipObjective: Our objective is simple: create durable brand value through responsible expansion and corporate-grade execution.
about.leadershipDesc: A leadership team committed to building durable brand value through disciplined execution and technology-driven transformation.
about.heritageDesc: Over four decades of building consumer trust and expanding into new categories — from fragrance and baby care to AI engineering.
about.foundationDesc: Established in Chennai with a focus on consumer product operations.
about.fbtLaunchesDesc: Future Beyond Technology established as the AI and cybersecurity division.
about.integrationDesc: Unified corporate platform connecting all divisions under one digital identity.
about.continueDesc: Explore each FIROSE division through dedicated experiences, while staying connected to one integrated group standard.

story.title: Our Story
story.milestone1Desc: Firose Enterprises began as a focused entrepreneurial venture driven by integrity, craftsmanship, and disciplined execution.
story.milestone2Desc: Manufacturing strength and market understanding expanded across fragrance, hygiene, and healthcare categories.
story.milestone3Desc: Future Beyond Technology (FBT) was launched to lead AI-driven software engineering and cybersecurity capabilities.
story.milestone4Desc: FIROSE now runs a diversified platform with quality-led products, scalable distribution, and enterprise-grade technology systems.
story.principle1Desc: We prioritize reliability and product integrity over short-term shortcuts.
story.principle2Desc: We scale divisions through clear category strategy and responsible market execution.
story.principle3Desc: We combine legacy manufacturing discipline with modern AI and cybersecurity capability.
story.evolutionDesc: Every chapter strengthened our ability to serve markets with confidence, consistency, and category precision.
story.platformDesc1: FIROSE is not just a brand owner. We are a systems-driven enterprise that designs category-focused product experiences while building durable operating capability behind every division.
story.platformDesc2: This is how we balance heritage and innovation: disciplined manufacturing, resilient distribution, and enterprise technology under one strategic umbrella.
story.lookingDesc1: With stronger category depth and technology leadership through FBT, FIROSE is building a global-standard enterprise with long-term strategic intent.
story.lookingDesc2: We continue to scale responsibly while preserving the core values that shaped our journey from day one.

leadershipPage.title: Leadership | FIROSE Enterprises
leadershipPage.description: Meet the founders and leaders of FIROSE Enterprises — Sithic Basha, Feroze, Abdul Razak, and Srikanth — the team building India's next great consumer group.
leadershipPage.subtitle: Four leaders. One shared belief — that what is built in India, with care and discipline, can stand with the best in the world.
leadershipPage.founderQuote: I started FIROSE with one conviction — that every Indian family deserves products made with the same care and pride that we put into our own homes. That conviction has never changed.
leadershipPage.founderBio: The visionary behind FIROSE Enterprises. Sithic Basha built this group from the ground up in Chennai — with a belief that Indian-made products deserve world-class standards. His leadership philosophy: discipline, heritage, and relentless quality across every division.
leadershipPage.ferozeBio: Feroze drives the strategic and technology vision of FIROSE Enterprises while founding FBT — the group's AI engineering and cybersecurity division. He bridges heritage consumer brands with future-facing technology, ensuring FIROSE operates at the intersection of tradition and innovation.
leadershipPage.ferozeQuote: Be like the bee — fully dedicated, always in motion, and never giving up. Just like a bee builds its hive bit by bit, we can achieve great things through steady, purposeful hard work.
leadershipPage.razakBio: Abdul Razak created AR Perfumes with a singular vision — to bring the art of luxury fragrance to every Indian home. As Marketing Executive Head, he shapes the brand voice and market strategy of the entire FIROSE Group, combining deep product knowledge with an instinct for what customers truly desire.
leadershipPage.srikanthTitle1: Chief Technology Officer, Future Beyond Technology (FBT)
leadershipPage.srikanthBio: Srikanth leads the technology architecture at FBT. His thinking and brand communication makes him the backbone of the group's growth operations — ensuring every division runs with precision and purpose.
leadershipPage.closingTitle: Built in Chennai. Trusted Across India.
leadershipPage.closingBody: Every decision at FIROSE — from formulation to distribution, from software to fragrance — is made with one shared standard: good enough is never enough.
leadershipPage.philosophyDesc: At Firose Enterprises, leadership is not about hierarchy — it is about accountability. Every division operates with clear ownership, measurable outcomes, and a shared commitment to the FIROSE standard of quality and trust.

timelinePage.title: Company Timeline
timelinePage.description: Explore the journey of Firose Enterprises from its founding in 1980 to its current position as a diversified enterprise group.
timelinePage.journeyDesc: Over four decades, Firose Enterprises has grown from a single operation in Chennai to a diversified group spanning consumer brands and enterprise technology.
timelinePage.milestone1: Firose Enterprises is founded in Chennai, India, establishing the first consumer product operations that would grow into a multi-division enterprise.
timelinePage.milestone2: The group expands into new consumer categories including personal care, baby nutrition, and hygiene products, building a diversified product portfolio.
timelinePage.milestone3: Firose strengthens its distribution network across India, partnering with retailers, institutions, and modern trade channels to expand market reach.
timelinePage.milestone4: The current generation initiates a strategic transformation, modernizing brand identities and establishing a corporate-grade digital presence.
timelinePage.milestone5: FBT is established as the AI engineering and cybersecurity division, marking Firose's expansion from consumer brands into enterprise technology.
timelinePage.milestone6: Firose Enterprises launches its unified corporate platform, connecting all divisions under one digital identity with dedicated brand experiences.
timelinePage.continueDesc: Learn more about our leadership, values, and the divisions that define Firose Enterprises.

brands.title: Our Divisions
brands.description: Portfolio overview of AR Perfumes, Femison, Neat & Fresh, and Future Beyond Technology under Firose Enterprises.
brands.brandsIntro: FIROSE ENTERPRISES combines consumer-focused brands with an AI-driven technology division for diversified, long-horizon growth.
brands.layoutSubtitle: Consumer and technology divisions across fragrance, baby care and nutrition, hygiene FMCG, and enterprise AI systems.

firoseMeaning.title: The Meaning Behind FIROSE
firoseMeaning.subtitle: FIROSE represents six pillars that drive every strategic decision, leadership action, and growth path across the group.
firoseMeaning.foundationDesc: We build on strong principles, disciplined execution, and enduring structure.
firoseMeaning.innovationDesc: We continuously evolve, embracing technology and forward-thinking solutions.
firoseMeaning.responsibilityDesc: We operate with integrity, accountability, and commitment to excellence.
firoseMeaning.opportunityDesc: We create platforms for growth for our brands, partners, and communities.
firoseMeaning.sustainabilityDesc: We focus on long-term impact, ensuring resilience and responsible expansion.
firoseMeaning.excellenceDesc: We pursue the highest standards in quality, performance, and leadership across every division.

arPerfumes.title: Premium Fragrance Brand
arPerfumes.description: AR Perfumes carries the premium fragrance identity within the group, with curated product storytelling and direct order conversion through WhatsApp.
arPerfumes.storyDesc: Built around identity and presence, AR Perfumes is positioned for premium fragrance seekers and gifting-led purchase journeys.
arPerfumes.heroSubtitle: A signature fragrance for every soul
arPerfumes.aboutSubtitle: Built on heritage ingredients and modern refinement, AR Perfume is crafted for intentional presence.
arPerfumes.aboutQuote: Tradition, intention, and timeless refinement in every bottle.
arPerfumes.aboutPara1: AR Perfume was created from one belief: presence is felt before words are spoken. Every composition is built to leave a calm, premium impression that reflects identity.
arPerfumes.aboutPara2: Our inspiration comes from timeless perfumery traditions, interpreted for modern daily wear with depth, balance, and consistency.
arPerfumes.aboutPara3: Quality and authenticity guide every bottle. From raw material selection to blending discipline, we focus on reliable performance and a signature finish worthy of gifting.
arPerfumes.inspirationDesc: Traditional notes and modern blending practices create scents with depth and identity.
arPerfumes.qualityAuthDesc: Each formula is curated for authenticity, balance, and dependable long-wear experience.
arPerfumes.collectionDesc: Curated fragrances that embody elegance and identity.
arPerfumes.allOrdersWhatsApp: All Phase-1 orders are handled directly on WhatsApp.
arPerfumes.whyChooseSubtitle: Luxury attars built for confidence, memory, and meaningful gifting.
arPerfumes.lastingDesc: Fragrances designed for depth and projection without overpowering the room.
arPerfumes.premiumCraftDesc: Carefully selected notes balanced for richness, comfort, and daily wear.
arPerfumes.giftReadyDesc: Elegant presentation options for personal moments and special occasions.
arPerfumes.transitionTitle: AR Perfumes is Moving to Its Own Home
arPerfumes.transitionDesc: We're excited to announce that AR Perfumes is transitioning to its dedicated website at arperfumes.in. AR Perfumes remains a proud brand of Firose Enterprises, maintaining the same quality standards and commitment you trust.
arPerfumes.brandOwnership: Brand Ownership: AR Perfumes is a registered brand owned and operated by Firose Enterprises. All product quality, customer service, and business operations remain under Firose Enterprises management.

femison.title: Baby Care & Nutrition Brand
femison.description: A trusted infant-care and family wellness portfolio with safety-focused formulations built for pharmacy, retail, and distributor channels.
femison.heroDesc: Built for healthcare and retail continuity with disciplined quality controls, documented process checkpoints, and dependable partner support.
femison.portfolioDesc: Femison combines baby gripe water, Arwat formulations, and glucose products for infant care and family wellness.
femison.glucoseAllAges: Glucose products for all age groups
femison.safetyDesc: Quality systems emphasize consistency, handling discipline, and product integrity.
femison.channelDesc: Prepared for pharmacy, retail, and distributor-oriented demand environments.
femison.portfolioArchDesc: A clean, trust-first product structure designed to support healthcare buyers, retail partners, and distributor expansion.
femison.complianceTrustDesc: Certification and assurance artifacts are available for onboarding and regulatory discussions.
femison.channelExpansionDesc: Expand Femison across healthcare and retail channels with a structured distributor onboarding model.
femison.productDiscDesc: Connect with the brand desk for product profiles, dosage guidance references, and documentation support.
femison.transitionTitle: Femison is Now Available on Its Dedicated Website
femison.transitionDesc: Visit femison.in for brand-led updates while Femison continues to operate as a core division of Firose Enterprises.
femison.brandOwnership: Brand Ownership: Femison remains owned and operated by Firose Enterprises, with quality, customer support, and business operations managed through the same corporate framework.

neatFresh.title: Housekeeping Product Brand
neatFresh.description: A premium hygiene division built for dependable cleaning performance across residential, workplace, and institutional environments.
neatFresh.heroDesc: Structured for repeat procurement and long-term distributor growth with consistent formulations, dependable packaging, and scalable supply.
neatFresh.homeCleaningDesc: General cleaners and household formulations for daily hygiene.
neatFresh.disinfectantDesc: Hygiene control products for routine and high-frequency touchpoints.
neatFresh.institutionalDesc: Channel-ready packing options for offices and commercial operations.
neatFresh.portfolioDesc: A clean, category-led structure designed for fast distributor onboarding and clear procurement conversations.
neatFresh.coreSegmentsDesc: Priority channels where Neat & Fresh is built to scale through partner networks.
neatFresh.distributorExpDesc: Expand Neat & Fresh across regional retail and institutional channels with a clear onboarding and support flow.
neatFresh.bulkDesc: Share volume, frequency, and delivery timelines for housekeeping and hygiene procurement.
neatFresh.transitionTitle: Neat & Fresh is Moving to Its Own Home
neatFresh.transitionDesc: We're excited to announce that Neat & Fresh is transitioning to its dedicated website at neatfresh.online. Neat & Fresh remains a proud brand of Firose Enterprises, maintaining the same quality standards and commitment you trust.
neatFresh.brandOwnership: Brand Ownership: Neat & Fresh is a registered brand owned and operated by Firose Enterprises. All product quality, customer service, and business operations remain under Firose Enterprises management.

fbt.scalableDesc: Production-grade software systems designed for scale, maintainability, and operational clarity.
fbt.securityDesc: Threat-aware architecture, risk reduction, and secure implementation built into delivery from day one.
fbt.aiDesc: Applied AI for automation and decision support without compromising governance or reliability.
fbt.consultingDesc: Early-stage technical decision support for long-term performance, reliability, and cost control.
fbt.fbtDesc: FBT delivers secure, scalable, and intelligent engineering systems for organizations that require strong architecture and long-term reliability.
fbt.transitionTitle: Future Beyond Technology is Available on Its Dedicated Website
fbt.transitionDesc: Visit futurebeyondtech.com for the complete FBT service experience while remaining part of the Firose Enterprises group.
fbt.brandOwnership: Brand Ownership: Future Beyond Technology is a division operated by Firose Enterprises, with delivery, quality, and strategic oversight maintained under the same corporate framework.

brochure.title: Digital Brochure — Product Catalogue
brochure.description: Explore the complete FIROSE Group product catalogue — 55+ products across Femison and Neat & Fresh.
brochure.ogDesc: Browse 55+ products across two trusted brands. Health, wellness, and home care solutions for every Indian household.
brochure.heroDesc: Explore our complete product range across two trusted consumer brands — health, wellness, and home care solutions for every Indian household.
brochure.contactDesc: Every brand has a dedicated contact person. Reach the right team directly.
brochure.downloadDesc: Download our product catalogues as PDF for offline use, WhatsApp sharing, or distributor presentations.
brochure.fullCatalogueDesc: Complete product list — Femison + Neat & Fresh (55 products)

businessWithUs.description: Connect with Firose Enterprises for distribution, bulk orders, private labeling, and category expansion enquiries.
businessWithUs.heading: Business With Us
businessWithUs.intro: We work with distributors and retailers to scale our brand portfolio through disciplined channel growth.
businessWithUs.distributorDesc: Regional and channel-specific distributor onboarding for qualified markets.
businessWithUs.bulkOrdersDesc: Bulk supply support for modern trade, institutional demand, and channel-led requirements.
businessWithUs.privateLabelingDesc: Private label collaborations are available as a planned expansion track.

manufacturing.heading: Manufacturing & Quality

manufacturing.certifications: Certifications: Certification and compliance documents can be shared based on onboarding stage and requirements.

divisions.arPerfumesDesc: Luxury fragrance division focused on premium attars, gifting collections, and identity-led brand storytelling.
divisions.femisonDesc: Healthcare and nutrition division offering baby gripe water, Arwat formulations, and glucose products for everyday family use.
